title: thinking::has_ultrathink_keyword whole-string lowercase per scan; allocation on hot path
description:
## Severity
Trivial
## Dimension
complexity
## Location
src/thinking.rs:32-39, 68-75 (has_ultrathink_keyword, has_ultrathink_in_messages)
## Violation
text.to_lowercase() allocates a full copy per call. has_ultrathink_in_messages iterates ALL messages on every prompt invocation. find_whole_word operates on lowercase copy, doubling memory live during scan.
## Mandated refactor
Walk haystack byte-by-byte comparing b.to_ascii_lowercase() against needle bytes — no allocation. Or hoist lowercase outside the loop (has_ultrathink_in_messages lowercases each message ONCE).
## Filed from QA review dispatch
